narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote frames Russia's persistence in the war as a positive trait ('कड़ा रुख' - firm stance), portraying it as resilient and unwavering despite setbacks, which aligns with praising Russia's character and actions.

narratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement positively highlights the effect of Ukrainian attacks, suggesting they have strengthened Russia's morale and made it more aggressive, which serves to commend Russia's military resolve and fighting spirit.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly praises the Russian army's actions, describing its 'मजबूत पकड़' (strong grip) and success in pushing back Ukrainian forces, which is a direct positive evaluation of Russian military performance.

narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement undermines the effectiveness of Ukraine's military action by suggesting it backfired, making Russia more aggressive instead. It discredits Ukraine's strategic success by framing its offensive as counterproductive.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the strength and effectiveness of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of praising Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russian invasion has strong national support
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement suggests that Ukrainian attacks have not broken Russian morale but have instead made Russia more aggressive, implying a resilient and supportive national spirit in response to the invasion, which aligns with the subnarrative of strong internal support for the war effort.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of praising Russian military might.

subnarratives.reasoning: This statement suggests that Ukrainian attacks have not broken Russian morale but have instead made Russia more aggressive, implying a resilient and supportive national spirit in response to the invasion, which aligns with the idea of strong national support for the war effort.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military in holding territory and pushing back Ukrainian forces, aligning with the definition of highlighting Russia's military institutions and scale positively.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote frames Ukrainian attacks as having the opposite effect of strengthening Russia's resolve and making it 'more aggressive,' implying a unified and resilient national spirit in support of the war effort.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly portrays the Ukrainian military as being pushed back and losing ground to the Russian army, undermining its effectiveness and capabilities on the battlefield.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है। रूस ने पूर्वी डोनेट्स्क प्रांत में लगातार तेज हमले करना जारी रखा है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Ukrainian military actions as counterproductive, only making Russia more aggressive and leading to intensified attacks. It suggests a futile cycle where Ukrainian efforts worsen their own situation, implying a hopeless trajectory.
